name: BOT REQUESTS!
description:
𓄋-BOT REQUESTS!-𓄋

___________________________

Hello everyone!! Im opening bot request’s on here (as i know not everyone likes doing the google doc’s forms) feel free to leave a request in the comments!💕

-PLEASE NOTE-

___________________________

-I’ll do mostly any type of bot just nothing that goes against jai TOS or anything involving a character who is canonically a minor! As well as no weird sibling stuff/parent stuff (Step siblings/Step parents etc... its just very icky to me😭) father/mother figure bots are totally okay though!🙂‍↕️

-I can also do other characters that aren’t Loki/Marvel related. I know that’s mostly what my page consists off but im open to more characters AISJSJ

(Smut is okay ofc!🤭)

___________________________
